positive: A charming vintage botanical diagram of a fantastical, non-existent flower (the 'Dreambloom'). Detailed cross-section view, labeled parts, presented on aged parchment paper. Style: Victorian scientific illustration, copperplate etching, muted earth tones, highly educational.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern art, digital painting, saturated colors
